title: Pellezara station
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{SpaceStation |image= |name=Pellezara station |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Space station/Legends|Space station]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=40 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] |width= |height= |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Southern Core]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] |sector=[[Duro sector/Legends|Duro sector]]
[[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]; [[Outlier systems]] (Imperial) |system=[[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]] |coordinates=M-11 |xyz= |orbited= |distance= |routes= |role= |affiliation= |constructed= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |owners=[[Datch family]] |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} '''Pellezara station''' was a 40-kilometer long floating [[Realspace/Legends|space]] city in the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]] that serviced the many large [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] that brought supplies to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. It was owned by the parents of [[Tarrin Datch/Legends|Tarrin Datch]], who often put on flight shows to keep the freighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] from boredom. ==History== The [[Space station/Legends|space station]] was a stop over maintenance point for [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] en route to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. While their [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were being serviced in Pellezara's maintenance bays, bored [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] frequently attended flight shows put on by the station's owners, the [[Datch family]]. These shows involved souped up [[cargo-flitter]]s and [[Cargo tug/Legends|tugs]], and were performed in areas crowded with free-floating service bays and containers. These obstacles were what made the shows spectacular to watch. The Datch's were often assisted in performing these shows by their children, including the talented [[Tarrin Datch/Legends|Tarrin Datch]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], a seemingly mundane freighter docked at Pellezara's main tower for restocking. The seventeen-year-old Tarrin was responsible for replacing [[gravity disk]]s in the freighter's deckplates when he dismantled a particularly stubborn plate, only to find a hidden compartment containing a wounded [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She called herself [[Jan Ors]]. In her ill, delirious state, Ors mentioned to Datch that her freighter held a cargo full of prime-grade [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] [[Slug/Legends|slugs]] stolen from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that were to be delivered to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. When the Empire discovered the theft of their fuel slugs, and followed the freighter to Duro, Datch knew he could not allow the cargo to fall back into Imperial hands. The freighter's crew had disembarked from their ship, and Datch was the only pilot aboard. He broke away from the station's main tower, much to the dismay of the stranded crew, and headed for open space with an Imperial [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttle]] in close pursuit. Datch was able to evade the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] by steering the freighter through heavy traffic as though it were a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], soon entering [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to leave Pellezara behind for good. Ors directed Datch to a secret [[Jedi Enclave|Rebel base]] on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Finding safe harbor with the Rebellion, Datch went on to train as a fighter pilot. ==Sources== *[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]] *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Duro system locations]] [[Category:Space stations in the Core Worlds]] [[Category:Space stations in the Southern Core]]
